channel.title: Security Engineering on chasepd
channel.description: Recent content in Security Engineering on chasepd

item.title: I Got Banned By Anthropic
item.description: How an erroneous ban led me to discover a thriving ecosystem of better (and cheaper) alternatives About two months ago, I woke up to find myself completely locked out of all Anthropic services. No warning, no specific explanation—just a generic ban notification and a refund for my account. I had been using Claude for like a year regularly. As a security professional, I had been using Claude for legitimate research and development work.

item.title: Using Claude Code as an AppSec Engineer
item.description: Introduction As a product security engineer, I’m always looking for tools that can help me move faster without compromising on security. Recently, I’ve started using Claude Code, and I’m genuinely impressed by how well it can augment appsec workflows. The AppSec Challenge Security engineering often feels like we’re underwater—drowning in code reviews, vulnerability assessments, threat modeling, and the constant need to stay ahead of emerging threats - and that was before the velocity increase caused by AI coding tools.
